title: Security Overview
content: Acme RAG platform encrypts data in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256. Keys are managed by Acme KMS with quarterly rotation. Access to production requires MFA and is limited by least-privilege roles.

title: Compliance and Audits
content: Acme maintains SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications and completes annual third-party audits. Compliance reports are available upon request under NDA.

title: Service Level Agreement
content: The standard SLA provides 99.9% monthly uptime with service credits for breaches based on monthly spend. Critical incidents must be acknowledged within 1 business hour.

title: Implementation Plan
content: Typical implementation takes 4 to 6 weeks and includes discovery, data ingestion, validation, and user acceptance testing. Acme assigns a delivery manager and solutions engineer.

title: Pricing Sheet
content: Enterprise plan starts at $6,000 per month for up to 50 users. Additional users are billed at $85 per user per month. Professional services onboarding is a one-time fee of $12,000.

title: Data Retention Policy
content: Customer data is retained for 30 days after contract termination unless the customer requests earlier deletion. Backups are encrypted and retained for 35 days.

title: Integrations
content: Acme integrates with Slack, Google Drive, and Microsoft 365. Slack messages are ingested via OAuth and stored with channel metadata.

title: Deployment Architecture
content: The platform can be deployed in a customer-managed VPC or in Acme-hosted cloud. For customer-managed deployments, Acme provides Terraform modules and reference architectures.
